explanation: This command sets the COMPlus_ETWEnabled environment variable to disable ETW logging, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command sets the COMPlus_ETWFlags environment variable to disable specific ETW logging flags, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command sets both COMPlus_ETWEnabled and COMPlus_ETWFlags environment variables to disable ETW logging, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
